data.content: 1. Regression coverage is still incomplete. `/private/tmp/loom-6d6f-fix/crates/loom-cli/tests/update_integration.rs` only simulates one redirect followed by `200 OK`, so it does not reproduce the production failure where GitHub redirects from `/latest/download/...` to `/releases/download/{tag}/...` and then again to a CDN URL. 2. The helper tests in `/private/tmp/loom-6d6f-fix/crates/loom-cli/src/commands/update.rs` validate parsing and relative `Location` handling, but they do not prove the end-to-end update flow now stops at the first redirect hop. Add a regression test for the two-hop redirect path, then requeue for review.
